name: Handicapped Driver Svc-AL LLC
owner_or_parent: MobilityWorks (BraunAbility / WernerCo / private equity owned wheelchair-accessible vehicle dealer chain)
districts_or_customers: individual consumers and commercial fleet buyers in northern Alabama and southern Tennessee
recent_news: Operates as MobilityWorks of Huntsville at 2150 Meridian St N; MobilityWorks is a national chain of wheelchair-accessible van dealers, not an operating student-transportation contractor.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. This is a MobilityWorks wheelchair-van dealership location (sales/service), not a school-bus or student-transport operator. Disqualify.

name: B Jays Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: counties, municipalities, healthcare providers, and schools across 9 IL counties: LaSalle, DuPage, Kane, Cook, Kendall, Lake, McHenry, Will, Grundy
recent_news: MBE/WBE/DBE-certified woman/minority-owned firm; grown from 1 converted van to 30+ paratransit vans delivering 45,000+ annual rides; school trips a secondary line behind NEMT.
fit_notes: Independent, woman/minority-owned, but core business is NEMT/paratransit (vans, not yellow buses) with only ancillary school/daycare trips. Marginal Summit fit; better suited to a NEMT consolidator than a yellow-bus tuck-in.

name: Airways Limousine
recent_news: Operates from 763 Montgomery St, Jersey City — same address as Mount Sinai Travel & Limo; no evidence of school-bus or student-transport contracts. Website 'Verisresidential.com' is a real-estate REIT, not the company's site (likely listed because Veris Residential owns the Montgomery St building).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. Tiny 5-employee limo operator with no confirmed school-transport activity; flagged 'special_needs' in source data appears to be a miscode. Disqualify.

name: Connecticut Handivan Inc
districts_or_customers: wheelchair-bound patients across CT; government/Medicaid contracts (SAM-registered federal vendor)
recent_news: Long-tenured CT NEMT operator (~32 years in business as of 2026); no public M&A or growth news; federal SAM vendor registration active.
fit_notes: Independent, long-tenured (~32 yrs) wheelchair-van NEMT operator; founder may be approaching succession. However, business is NEMT, not school/SPED routes — limited yellow-bus fit for Summit; relevant only if Summit pursues CT special-needs/SPED tuck-ins.

name: Be Driven LLC
districts_or_customers: statewide CT private-pay and medical clients
recent_news: Small Sandy Hook, CT wheelchair-van operator; subject of a 2021 CT DOT administrative decision (Docket 2111-N-103-L) related to motor-carrier authority; no school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a meaningful tuck-in. Sub-5-employee owner-operated wheelchair-van concierge service with no evidence of school contracts; too small and wrong service mix for Summit. Disqualify.
